title: Add paged event history loading to TUI log panel
description: Extend TUI state with reverse-reading history support so operators can page backwards through prior event-log entries without loading the full file into memory.
acceptance_criteria: `TuiRuntimeState` tracks `_history_offset` initialized to current EOF on startup.
`load_event_log_history(n_lines)` reverse-reads in fixed chunks, handles chunk-boundary partial lines correctly, and prepends up to `n_lines` displayable formatted entries.
Repeated history loads move progressively earlier through the file and stop cleanly at byte offset 0.
When no more history remains, the implementation supports the app showing the one-time `beginning of event log` marker without duplicating prior history content.
